clauses.text: By creating an account, the user agrees to these Terms and Conditions.
The user must provide accurate information while creating an account.
Subscription fees must be paid within 30 days of receiving the invoice.
Refunds are available only under the conditions described in Clause C3.
We collect personal information according to our Privacy Policy.
Personal information may be shared with third-party service providers as described in Clause C5.
We may terminate your account if you violate these Terms or fail to comply with Clause C2.
The user shall not misuse the service or attempt unauthorized access.
Our liability shall not exceed the amount paid by the user during the previous twelve months.
We may modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
